spec_match.rationale: Two concurrent scrollIntoView calls (step indicator + form content) — a real-world use of the feature.

interactive.rationale: Multi-step form, advance/back buttons trigger concurrent scrolls.

edge_cases.rationale: Single use case. No instrumentation showing both scrolls actually animated (no timeline / frame data).

openQuestions.title: Surface scroll-start/scroll-end events
openQuestions.detail: Hook scrollend events on both containers and surface a log showing both fired without one being cancelled. Right now the visible scroll is the only feedback.
